title: KA THEI HI, KEI HONG TANPA HING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka theihi kei hong Tanpa hing him
Leitung ah hong pai kik ding hi
Ka thei hi, nuntakna thak hong pia
Hehpihna vaang a khut sung om.
Kathei, kathei To Zeisu hing hi,
Leitung ah hong pai kik ding hi,
Hehpihna vaang a khut sung om.
Ka thei hi hong thuciam pel ngei kei
A gen sa thu bei ngeilo ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kathei hi ka om nang mun bawl khol
A om na peuh kei zong om ning
Alamdang a mah'n kei hong keem hi
Kei ading in hong pai kik ding.
